description_long: This object is a black and red bottle-shaped item with a cylindrical central body and a prominent, textured grip area on both sides. The top features a large, round, white cap and a smaller, raised white button, suggesting a functional closure or dispensing mechanism. The front of the object has a circular, lens-like structure, while the back displays a rectangular, screen-like panel, possibly for display or labeling. The surface is mostly smooth and glossy, with the grip areas appearing slightly textured for better handling. No visible branding or text is present, and the object appears robust and undamaged.
description: A black and red bottle-shaped object with a large white cap, textured grips, and a circular front element, featuring a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the prominent red grip, large white cap, and the cylindrical body with a lens-like front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular, lens-like structure and symmetrical red grips on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the white cap more visible and the red grip on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a rectangular, screen-like panel and both white cap and button on top.
